error_signature: (#10) Application does not have permission for this action
title: Instagram API permission error when posting
symptom: The user receives an error message stating that the application does not have permission for the action when trying to post reels. The workflow was functioning correctly previously.
applies_when: Using Instagram node to post content
Instagram account is linked to a Facebook page
not_this_if: The error occurs in a different context or node
Permissions have been verified and are correct
root_cause: The error occurs when the Instagram account is not properly linked to the Facebook page or the necessary permissions are not granted. This can happen if the connection was lost or if the user has not logged into the Meta Business Suite to refresh the link.
fix_steps: Log into your Facebook account on Meta Business Suite
Ensure the Instagram page is connected to the Facebook account
Test the API call again to see if the error persists
agent_instruction: Log into Meta Business Suite and reconnect your Instagram page to your Facebook account.
